description_long: This rifle features a striking metallic red finish on its main body, contrasted by black polymer components such as the pistol grip, adjustable stock, and foregrip. The weapon is equipped with a large dual-drum magazine, suggesting a high ammunition capacity, and a short, tactical barrel with a distinctive angular muzzle device. There are visible rails on the upper receiver for mounting optics, though only basic iron sights are present. The stock is collapsible and has a tactical pouch or accessory attached to its side. The overall design is modern and aggressive, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, metallic red rifle with a dual-drum magazine, collapsible stock, and angular muzzle device, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic red body, dual-drum magazine, collapsible stock, and angular muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin drum magazines and the compact, tactical barrel with muzzle device.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the stock, magazine, and accessory pouch.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the dual-drum magazine and the back of the collapsible stock.
